summary: Full E2E review of TON City 2.1. Backend: 37/37 pytest cases passed (100%) covering Auth, Tutorial guard, Cities, TON Island, Businesses, Patrons, Market, Banking, Withdrawal, Credit, Security/2FA, Admin guard, Leaderboard, Notifications, Buffs, Stats, Sprites, Health. Frontend: landing page, login flow, JWT persistence in localStorage, tutorial welcome modal, navigation to /island, /leaderboard, /security, /credit all work; mobile responsive (390x844) shows hamburger menu. Issues found: (1) several SPA routes (/dashboard, /cities, /businesses, /market, /notifications) render empty body when navigated directly via URL, (2) UI mixes EN and Russian strings in dashboard widgets (i18n inconsistency), (3) total_volume_ton on landing differs between logged-in (150.0) and logged-out (1330.0) views — frontend computes circulation differently than /api/stats response.

minor.issue: Spec referenced /api/auth/logout, /api/auth/change-password, /api/sprites/{type}, /api/credit/apply, /api/credit/{id}/repay — actual routes are /api/auth/update-password, /api/sprites/info, /api/credit/apply (OK), /api/credit/repay/{id}, /api/credit/my-loans. No dedicated /logout (client just discards JWT).
Returns total_volume_ton=1330.0 but landing UI shows 150.0 when authenticated user logged in — frontend computation mismatch with API.

ui_bugs.issue: Direct navigation to /dashboard, /cities, /businesses, /market, /notifications returns empty body (no content rendered). Routes likely exist but components render nothing or rely on sidebar context.
Mixed EN+RU strings: 'Калькулятор', 'P2P Торговля', 'Мои бизнесы', 'Рейтинг' appear while UI language is set to EN. i18n keys not translated.
Balance shown as '100,000 $CITY' instead of TON — currency unit inconsistency (game-internal vs TON).
TON in circulation differs between landing (logged-in: 150.0) and logged-out (1330.0). Same /api/stats but different display.

integration_issues.issue: No visible Logout button found in user dropdown selectors tested; could not complete logout flow via Playwright. Token cleanup unverified.

issues: Sidebar uses icon-only nav with no text labels visible at 1920w; no aria-labels detected — accessibility issue
Tailwind via CDN warning in console (production should use compiled CSS)
GOOGLE button visible but Google OAuth not configured (will fail at runtime if clicked)

action_items: Investigate and fix empty-body SPA routes (/dashboard, /cities, /businesses, /market, /notifications) — verify they render when accessed via direct URL.
Reconcile TON-in-circulation displayed value (150.0 logged-in vs 1330.0 logged-out vs API 1330.0).
Complete English translations for dashboard widget labels (currently Russian: Калькулятор/P2P Торговля/Мои бизнесы/Рейтинг).
Add visible Logout control with stable data-testid in user menu.
Add data-testid attributes to sidebar nav, login form, and dashboard widgets to enable reliable E2E automation.
Replace Tailwind CDN with compiled build in production.
Either hide or wire up Google OAuth button on login modal.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/server.py is ~9500 lines — must be split into modules (already partial with /routes/* but most endpoints still inline). Maintainability risk.
Spec listed endpoints not present (e.g. /api/auth/logout, /api/auth/change-password, /api/sprites/{type}) — keep frontend/backend route contract documented to avoid confusion.
Frontend has no /dashboard route component but sidebar/links reference it — silent navigation no-op.
Tailwind via CDN in production app (console warning) — performance/SEO impact.
Mixed locale strings in dashboard hint at hard-coded RU strings in components instead of t('key') — review TutorialContext/Sidebar/Dashboard widgets.
/api/stats endpoint is unauthenticated and exposes treasury — confirm intentional public exposure.

success_rate.frontend: 70% (login + 4/9 routes + mobile + JWT persist OK; 5 routes empty body, logout flow not verifiable, i18n incomplete)

test_credentials: Admin: sanyanazarov212@gmail.com / Qetuyrwioo · Player: testuser@example.com / Test12345! (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend covered with /app/backend/tests/test_full_suite.py (pytest, 37 cases). For deeper UI testing, the following sidebar destinations need closer investigation: /dashboard, /cities, /businesses, /market, /notifications all returned empty body when navigated directly. The sidebar is icon-only — selectors like 'a:has-text("Cities")' do not work; use icon order or add data-testid. Tutorial welcome modal auto-opens for testuser if tutorial not completed — call POST /api/tutorial/reset to clear before tests requiring fresh state. /api/tutorial/start uses 200 (not 201) on first call. Admin endpoints all under prefix /api/admin/* and properly enforce 403 for non-admin. Mock-free run; TON/Telegram/Stripe were not exercised (no instant withdraw 2FA flow tested end-to-end since user has no 2FA enabled and TON keys not configured — would need separate setup).
rca_of_issues: Empty-body routes likely caused by: (a) routes missing in App.js Router; or (b) components fetching data with no fallback skeleton + auth check failing silently. Fix path: open /app/frontend/src/App.js and verify <Route path='...'> declarations match sidebar links; add loading/error states. The 150 vs 1330 TON circulation discrepancy may be due to FE recomputing circulation from user's own stats endpoint vs global /api/stats — verify the data source in landing component.
